CurrentIssues.ID: ForbiddenComment:AppMain.kt$// TODO: Implement Initializer that orchestrates:

LongMethod:GlmApiHttpContractTestHelper.kt$fun AsgardDescribeSpec.glmApiHttpContractTests( modelName: String, createApi: (outFactory: OutFactory, httpClient: OkHttpClient, modelName: String, maxTokens: Int, apiEndpoint: String, apiToken: String) -> DirectLLM, )
LongParameterList:GlmDirectLlmFactory.kt$GlmDirectLlmFactory$( outFactory: OutFactory, httpClient: OkHttpClient, modelName: String, maxTokens: Int, apiEndpoint: String, apiToken: String, )
MaxLineLength:CallGLMApiSandboxMain.kt$val llm = ContextInitializer.standard().initialize(outFactory = SimpleConsoleOutFactory.standard()).infra.directLlm.budgetHigh
MaxLineLength:ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolverTest.kt$ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolverTest$result shouldBe ResumableAgentSessionId(guid, AgentType.CLAUDE_CODE, "abc-session-id-123", TEST_MODEL)

MaxLineLength:ExecutionAgentInstructionsKeywordTest.kt$ExecutionAgentInstructionsKeywordTest$text shouldContain "${ProtocolVocabulary.CALLBACK_SIGNAL_SCRIPT} ${ProtocolVocabulary.Signal.DONE} ${ProtocolVocabulary.DoneResult.COMPLETED}"
MaxLineLength:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$"Direct LLM API returned empty content array. response_snippet=[${responseBody.take(MAX_ERROR_BODY_SNIPPET_LENGTH)}]"

MaxLineLength:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$"Direct LLM API returned non-text content block. type=[${firstBlock.getString("type")}], response_snippet=[${responseBody.take(MAX_ERROR_BODY_SNIPPET_LENGTH)}]"
MaxLineLength:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$"Failed to parse direct LLM API response. response_snippet=[${responseBody.take(MAX_ERROR_BODY_SNIPPET_LENGTH)}]"
MaxLineLength:GlmApiHttpContractTestHelper.kt$createApi: (outFactory: OutFactory, httpClient: OkHttpClient, modelName: String, maxTokens: Int, apiEndpoint: String, apiToken: String) -> DirectLLM
MaxLineLength:RoleCatalogLoaderTest.kt$RoleCatalogLoaderTest$implementor.descriptionLong shouldBe "Full-stack implementation agent that writes production code, tests, and documentation"

SpreadOperator:GitBranchManager.kt$GitBranchManagerImpl$(*gitCommand("rev-parse", "--abbrev-ref", "HEAD"))

TooManyFunctions:ContextForAgentProviderImpl.kt$ContextForAgentProviderImpl : ContextForAgentProvider
UseCheckOrError:ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolver.kt$ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolver$throw IllegalStateException( "Ambiguous GUID match: GUID [$guid] found in multiple files $filenames" )
UseCheckOrError:ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolver.kt$ClaudeCodeAgentSessionIdResolver$throw IllegalStateException( "No JSONL file contains GUID [$guid]" )
UseCheckOrError:ContextInitializer.kt$ContextInitializerImpl$throw IllegalStateException( "Required environment variable [${Constants.Z_AI_API.API_TOKEN_ENV_VAR}] is not set" )
UseCheckOrError:EnvironmentValidator.kt$EnvironmentValidatorImpl$throw IllegalStateException( "Required environment variables are missing or blank: $missing" )

UseCheckOrError:GLMHighestTierApiIntegTest.kt$GLMHighestTierApiIntegTest$throw IllegalStateException( "Integration test requires [${Constants.Z_AI_API.API_TOKEN_ENV_VAR}] environment variable to be set" )

UseCheckOrError:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$throw IllegalStateException( "Direct LLM API returned empty content array. response_snippet=[${responseBody.take(MAX_ERROR_BODY_SNIPPET_LENGTH)}]" )

UseCheckOrError:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$throw IllegalStateException( "Direct LLM API returned non-text content block. type=[${firstBlock.getString("type")}], response_snippet=[${responseBody.take(MAX_ERROR_BODY_SNIPPET_LENGTH)}]" )
UseCheckOrError:GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi.kt$GlmAnthropicCompatibleApi$throw IllegalStateException( "Direct LLM API returned null body. HTTP status=[${response.code}]" )
